brand.name: FastBid
brand.headline: Photos and voice notes into a clean bid.

memory.headline: The bid gets smarter after every job.
memory.description: FastBid should remember what the owner charged, which jobs won, and where profit leaked.

intakeActions.title: Add job photos
intakeActions.detail: Fence, drywall, deck, floor, roof, or whatever needs pricing.

intakeActions.title: Record voice notes
intakeActions.detail: Talk like you are explaining the job to your helper.

intakeActions.title: Drop old invoices
intakeActions.detail: FastBid pulls prices, scope language, and lessons learned.

businessRules.title: Default labor rate
businessRules.detail: $86 per crew hour for two-person repair jobs.

businessRules.title: Target margin
businessRules.detail: Aim for 22% to 28% after material markup and overhead.

businessRules.title: Usual exclusions
businessRules.detail: Permits, hidden rot, paint/stain, electrical, and customer-supplied materials.

summary.name: Johnson fence repair
summary.note: Draft ready from photos, voice notes, and three similar fence repairs.

currentJob.label: Current job
currentJob.title: Johnson fence repair
currentJob.voiceNote: Customer needs roughly 18 feet replaced, haul-away included, stain optional.

generatedBid.label: Recommended quote
generatedBid.scope: Replace damaged fence boards, reuse existing posts if sound, install matching hardware, and haul away damaged material. Stain and gate adjustment are separate add-ons.

preSendReview.title: Before you send
preSendReview.hint: FastBid keeps the owner in control.
riskFlags: Confirm existing posts are reusable before final quote.
Last similar repair ran half a day long because the gate sagged.
Exclude stain unless the customer approves it as an add-on.

summary.name: Lopez side-yard fence
summary.note: Needs haul-away, gate adjustment option, and a clear stain exclusion.

currentJob.label: Current job
currentJob.title: Lopez side-yard fence
currentJob.voiceNote: Customer wants the side-yard run tightened up, damaged boards replaced, and the gate adjusted if it still drags.

generatedBid.label: Recommended quote
generatedBid.scope: Remove damaged side-yard fence boards, replace matching boards and fasteners, adjust gate alignment if hardware is reusable, and haul away debris. Stain is excluded unless approved separately.

preSendReview.title: Before you send
preSendReview.hint: FastBid keeps the owner in control.
riskFlags: Confirm whether the gate hardware can be reused.
Photo angle does not show the full post condition.
Stain should stay excluded unless the customer picks a color.

summary.name: Brown deck rail patch
summary.note: Photos suggest possible hidden rot, so the draft includes a framing exclusion.

currentJob.label: Current job
currentJob.title: Brown deck rail patch
currentJob.voiceNote: Deck rail is loose on the corner. Customer wants it safe before guests come over this weekend.

generatedBid.label: Recommended quote
generatedBid.scope: Secure loose deck rail section, replace damaged balusters where visible, reinforce accessible connections, and clean up work area. Hidden rot, framing replacement, and finish work are excluded.

preSendReview.title: Before you send
preSendReview.hint: FastBid keeps the owner in control.
riskFlags: Inspect for rot before guaranteeing final price.
Past deck rail job lost margin when framing damage was missed.
Exclude code upgrades unless the customer approves a larger repair.
